title: LS25 5FP, THE MALTINGS ORGANIC TREATMENT LIMITED: environmental permit issued - EPR/FP3090SZ/V011
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: THE MALTINGS ORGANIC TREATMENT LIMITED   Installation name: The Maltings Organic Treatment Facility   Permit number: EPR/FP3090SZ/V011   "
